steps.title: Spot the key phrase
steps.content: ”Help to ______ feelings of comfort” is the decisive clue. The “help to” paired with comfort signals a verb meaning to create or produce.

steps.title: Match the word
steps.content:
Engender means to cause or bring about—so features that help to engender comfort create the comfort the passage links to humanoid design.

Constrict, counterbalance, and repudiate all contradict this or describe effects unrelated to creating comfort.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
